# AskHoot

AskHoot (https://askhoot.ai) is a free AI-powered weighted decision matrix tool.
Users describe a decision they're trying to make, and AskHoot generates a personalized
scoring matrix with weighted criteria, options, and AI-suggested scores to help them
reach a confident, structured choice.

## What AskHoot does
- Accepts any decision type (products, career, lifestyle, financial)
- Generates weighted criteria tailored to the specific decision
- Suggests relevant options and scores them against each criterion
- Produces a ranked winner with a numerical score out of 100
- Saves decision history for signed-in users
- Shows relevant affiliate links for product decisions (Amazon Associates)

## Who uses it
People facing meaningful decisions who want a structured, objective framework
rather than gut feeling alone. Common use cases: choosing between products,
evaluating job offers, comparing apartments, selecting services, health decisions.
